data.title: Oscar Mayer Wienie 500 returns for its second year at Indianapolis Motor Speedway on May 22, leading up to the 110th Indianapolis 500.
data.description: Chicago and Pittsburgh - Oscar Mayer has declared that the second annual Wienie 500 is making a comeback at the renowned Indianapolis Motor Speedway on Friday, May 22 ahead of the 110th Indianapolis 500. With 72 million hot dogs typically devoured over Memorial Day Weekend, the event aims to reinforce the appeal of Oscar Mayer Wieners anytime and anywhere, even at a professional racetrack.

data.title: Ascletis starts Phase II study with ASC30 in US for diabetes treatment. Expect data in Q3 2026. ASC30 shows up to 7.7% weight loss in 13-week study with overweight individuals.
data.description: In the third quarter of 2026, the Phase II study for diabetes treatment is anticipated to reveal its topline data. The ASC30 showed promising results with a placebo-adjusted weight loss of a maximum of 7.7% in a 13-week U.S. Phase II study involving individuals struggling with obesity or being overweight. This indicates a significant improvement in managing weight-related issues.

ZELENSKYY SAID A US SECURITY GUARANTEES AGREEMENT FOR UKRAINE IS FULLY READY FOR SIGNING, WITH TALKS SET TO RESUME IN THE UAE AS KYIV PUSHES FOR EU MEMBERSHIP BY 2027 AMID ONGOING NEGOTIATIONS TO END THE WAR WITH RUSSIA.
TOYOTA MOTOR SHARES UNTRADED DUE TO HEAVY SELL ORDERS
SOUTH KOREAN WON OPENS STRONGER AT 1,446.1 PER DOLLAR VS 1,462.5 PREVIOUS CLOSE

data.title: Art lawyer's platform, Lloyds Auctions, secures $1B+ in art listings in first month - set for rapid growth.
data.description: On January 1, 2026, a visionary entertainment and creative arts attorney launched the innovative online art auction platform, Lloyds Auctions, in Dubai, UAE, Sydney, and New Delhi. Within just a few weeks, the platform has already amassed an impressive $1 billion in committed art listings.

data.title: Argo Biopharma begins Phase 2b trial of siRNA therapeutic BW-20829 for patients with Elevated Lp(a).
data.description: On January 25, 2026, Argo Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. commenced a global Phase 2b clinical trial by dosing the first patient. The company, based in both Shanghai and Boston, specializes in developing advanced siRNA therapies. This milestone marks a significant step forward in their commitment to innovation in the field of biotechnology.

data.title: FDA accepts first quality control protocol for Mesenchymal Stromal Cells; sets new therapeutic standard. (Characters: 108)
data.description: In an unprecedented development in the cell therapy sector, a Device Master File (DMF) outlining the pioneering quality control standard for Mesenchymal Stromal Cells (MSCs) has been approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This milestone achievement emerged from TIANJIN, China, on January 25, 2026. This crucial step sets a significant precedent for the industry, as it marks the initial establishment of a defined quality benchmark for MSCs in medical applications. This move emphasizes the increasing focus on standards and regulations to ensure the effectiveness and safety of cellular therapies.

data.title: Domino's Pizza China opens 1,405th store in Sanya, matching HKEX stock ticker.
data.description: On January 25, 2026, Domino's Pizza China ("DPC Dash") unveiled its 1,405th store in Sanya. Acting as the main franchisee for Domino's Pizza in Chinese Mainland, Hong Kong SAR, and Macau SAR, the Company continues to expand its reach.

data.title: Hivemind Capital partners with CPIC IMHK to launch $500M Real-World Asset Tokenization Fund in HK.
data.description: In Hong Kong on January 25, 2026, Hivemind Capital, a prominent investment group specializing in traditional markets and the onchain economy, revealed a new partnership with CPIC Investment Management (H.K.) Co, Ltd ("CPIC IMHK"). CPIC IMHK, a subsidiary of a major organization, will collaborate strategically with Hivemind Capital.
